message:
refactor(gateway): service layer improvements and state machine updates

Updates across gateway services:
- logging.ts: Middleware refinements
- dashboards.ts: Route handler updates
- agent-state-machine.ts: State transition improvements
- agent.ts: Agent service enhancements
- checkpoint.ts: Checkpoint handling updates
- dashboard.service.ts: Dashboard service refinements
- handoff-transfer.service.ts: Handoff transfer improvements
- mcp-agentmail.ts: Agent mail integration updates
- rch.service.ts: RCH service refinements

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
